sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data (id INT, value INT);
SELECT id, value, diff(value = 10, value) OVER (PARTITION BY value ORDER BY id) AS is_different FROM test_data;
UPDATE test_data SET value = 30 WHERE id = 2;
SELECT id, value, diff(value = 30, value) OVER (PARTITION BY value ORDER BY id) AS is_different FROM test_data;
